posts.author: TrucTran (Truc Tran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m wondering how I could create a column showing how long a status (of the item/task) has been updated.

For example,
Task A’s status has been changed from Backlog to In Progress on 10/Nov.
Today is 11/Nov
Expect to see in the column: 1 day
Or showing the day the status was last changed would work too.

I understand we could view the history of the task. But I would like to have an overview of things without clicking into every task/item.
